creator: rtdean@cytherianage.net
text:
On 05/03/11 00:40, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/jrrd,
>
> Please note that PR ports/156786 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/156786
>
I'm still alive, but I haven't had a chance to test this patch yet.  I
hope to get to that this weekend.
